one_time_description: Gain on disposal of tangible capital assets
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to: (1) inability to obtain information about investments in various entities limiting verification of investment balances; (2) First Nation has not prepared or approved consolidated budgets as required by PSAB Section 1200. Both limitations also affected the prior year (2019) audit opinion. All five consolidated subsidiaries are inactive. ISC funding extracted from Note 4 Due from Government balance for Indigenous Services Canada; total government transfers = federal ($7,183,721) + provincial ($2,250,516) = $9,434,237. OSR = miscellaneous + rent + investment income = $3,209,155. Annual debt service includes only long-term debt repayment of $267,806 plus capital lease repayment of $84,862 (total financing outflows $352,668). Net financial assets of $1,026,322 represents net assets (debt) per balance sheet. Restricted cash is CMHC replacement reserve of $128,059.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
